name: beta-sitosterol
mechanism: Beta-sitosterol is a phytosterol associated with anti-inflammatory and androgen-related signaling effects in saw palmetto and other botanicals; in clinical literature it is also studied for lower urinary tract symptom support.
contraindications: No major compound-specific interaction profile is locked here
theoretical overlap with hormone-active therapies remains possible.
summary: Beta-sitosterol is a phytosterol associated with anti-inflammatory and androgen-related signaling effects in saw palmetto and other botanicals; in clinical literature it is also studied for lower urinary tract symptom support.
